title: wasm-posix-kernel binaries release manifest
description: Schema for `manifest.json` files published alongside binaries releases. See docs/binary-releases.md.

abi_version.description: Kernel ABI this release targets. Must match the suffix in `release_tag`.

release_tag.description: GitHub release tag. Immutable; this manifest is tied to this tag.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp. Provenance only — not part of any correctness check.

generator.description: Tool + version that produced this manifest.

entries.description: Assets in this release, sorted alphabetically by `name`.

name.description: Asset filename in the release. Conventional format: `<program>-<upstream_version>-rev<revision>-<short-sha>.<ext>` (or `<program>-<short-sha>.<ext>` when no version is tracked).

program.description: Logical program name this asset belongs to. Multiple assets can share a program (e.g. different builds or runtime bundles).

kind.description: What kind of asset this is. `kernel`/`userspace` are our own artifacts; `program` is a bundle (zip) containing a .wasm + any runtime data + LICENSE; `vfs-image` is a pre-built filesystem image, possibly zstd-compressed.

arch.description: Target architecture. `any` for assets that aren't arch-specific (VFS images without embedded binaries).

upstream_version.description: Upstream software version (e.g. `9.1.0900` for Vim). Null for artifacts we author ourselves without a conventional version.

revision.description: Per-build revision. Bumped when we rebuild the same upstream version (e.g. patch fixes in our build scripts).

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the asset bytes. Fetchers must verify every download.

abi_version.description: Value of the `__abi_version` function export, if the asset is a wasm binary carrying the marker. Null for assets without it (VFS images, legacy binaries).

source.description: Where the sources for this asset live.

license.description: License of the upstream software or our own code.

advisories.description: Known security advisories against this asset. Empty array if none.

url.description: HTTP or Git URL pointing at the upstream sources (tarball, Git repo, mirror).

ref.description: Upstream reference — git tag/commit, upstream version, release label.

spdx.description: SPDX license expression (https://spdx.org/licenses/). For non-SPDX licenses, use the license name verbatim.

url.description: URL to the upstream LICENSE file or license text.

id.description: CVE identifier (e.g. `CVE-2026-1234`) or internal advisory ID (e.g. `advisory-2026-04-19-001`). Null when not yet assigned.

summary.description: Short human-readable description of the issue.

reference.description: URL to full writeup, CVE record, or vendor advisory.

resolved.description: True if a fixed build supersedes this asset. The fixed build is named in `resolved_by`.

resolved_by.description: Filename of the asset that supersedes this one (fix). Consumers can auto-upgrade.
